name: mcp-code-intelligence
description: Local Code Intelligence MCP Server — SQLite FTS5 + Semantic Search for codebase indexing and querying

scripts.copy-viewer: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp(p.resolve(__dirname,'../shared/viewer'),p.resolve(__dirname,'dist/viewer'))"
scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy-viewer && npm run copy-parsers && npm run copy-apex-wasm
scripts.copy-fixtures: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');function cp(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=p.join(s,f),dp=p.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cp(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cp(p.resolve(__dirname,'src/parsers/languages/__tests__/fixtures'),p.resolve(__dirname,'dist/parsers/languages/__tests__/fixtures'))"
scripts.copy-apex-wasm: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'node_modules/salesforce-ast/grammars/tree-sitter-apex.wasm');const dst=p.resolve(__dirname,'src/parsers/grammars/tree-sitter-apex.wasm');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(dst),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied tree-sitter-apex.wasm')}else{console.warn('tree-sitter-apex.wasm not found in salesforce-ast')}"

author: Duc Nguyen <dnguyenminh@hotmail.com>
